construct_verdict_reason: All three items directly measure perceived competence and self-assessed ability to understand science and technology, which are core components of science-technology self-efficacy.

items.reason: Directly measures self-assessed knowledge of science on a 0-10 scale, a core indicator of perceived competence in the science domain.
Directly measures self-assessed knowledge of technology on a 0-10 scale, a core indicator of perceived competence in the technology domain.
Measures perceived ability to understand science by assessing disagreement with the statement that science is too specialized, capturing subjective sense of competence in scientific domains.
